chapter_title.en: What is the difference between a hidden Imam and an Imam who does not exist or one that exists in the heavens?

text: وقد بينا فيما تقدم الفرق بين وجوده غائبا لا يصل إليه أحد أو أكثرهم وبين عدمه حتى إذا كان المعلوم التمكن بالأمر يوجده.

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: We have also previously elucidated the difference between the instance that he exists in hiding where no one or few can reach him and the instance of his non-existence until his capacity of governance is known and then God creates him.
